_comment: MISTER WOK — posts.json v1.0 | THE SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH FOR ALL BLOG CONTENT
_instructions: To add a new post: 1) Create the HTML file in /journal/ with a clean slug name. 2) Add ONE new entry to the 'posts' array below (copy template at bottom). 3) Upload both files. That is all. Never edit index.html for blog updates. 4) When changing a post from status:'scheduled' to status:'live', also add the post URL to sitemap.xml under TIER 0.8 and update <lastmod>. The 'url' field is canonical for all hyperlinks and sitemaps. The 'file' field is the physical path on disk. When they differ, use 'url' for links and 'file' for server-side resolution only.

posts.title: Still at the Flame: Ten Years of Wok, Nairobi, and the Shared Table
posts.subtitle: A decade of smoke, steel, and the table Nairobi learned to share
posts.excerpt: A ten-year retrospective on what Mister Wok built in Nairobi — the craft, the shared table, and the guests who grew up with us. Published on our founding day, 14 February 2026.
posts.image_alt: Mister Wok kitchen — wok at 300°C, Nairobi

posts.title: What NTV's AM Live Revealed About Mister Wok in 2014
posts.subtitle: The 10-year anniversary. Chef Francis Makau. The wing secret. Live on national television.
posts.excerpt: NTV Kenya's AM Live hosted founder Karim and Chef Francis Makau to mark a decade of wok-fired cuisine. The wing marination, the stir-fry sequence, the 100% Kenyan brand story — all of it, on camera.
posts.image_alt: Mister Wok founder Karim on NTV AM Live with host Sheila Mwanyigha, 2014

posts.title: Spring Rolls Are Not Just Food. They Are Little Gold Bars.
posts.subtitle: The yuánbǎo. The wealth tradition. 22 years of hand-rolling gold at Mister Wok.
posts.excerpt: Spring rolls are shaped to resemble ancient Chinese gold ingots. The golden colour after frying is the point. Why eating spring rolls at the start of spring invites wealth — and why Mister Wok hand-rolls them fresh every day.
posts.image_alt: Mister Wok freshly hand-rolled spring rolls — golden, crisp, shaped like gold ingots

posts.title: Wok Hei Physics: The Chemistry Behind the Flame
posts.subtitle: Why a home stove at 4kW can never replicate what Mister Wok achieves at 55kW.
posts.excerpt: The science of Wok Hei — the Maillard reaction, volatile aromatics, and why the 300°C surface temperature of an industrial wok burner produces a flavour compound that is physically impossible to replicate at home.
posts.image_alt: Industrial wok burner at 300°C — the flame that creates Wok Hei

posts.title: The Nairobi Birthday & Corporate Catering Guide — Wok Edition
posts.subtitle: From 20 to 500 guests. How to spec a Mister Wok catering order that doesn't compromise on quality.
posts.excerpt: Everything you need to know about booking Mister Wok for your next corporate event, birthday dinner, graduation celebration, or private function. Proven across 50+ events including PwC, GTC Towers opening, and King Kaka's listening party.
posts.image_alt: Mister Wok corporate catering spread at a Nairobi event

posts.title: The Long-Grain Standard: Wok Dynamics & Aromatic Rice
posts.subtitle: The rice nobody talks about. The one that changes everything.
posts.excerpt: Most Chinese restaurants in Nairobi use short-grain sticky rice. Mister Wok uses premium aged long-grain aromatic rice. One is a compromise. The other is a deliberate, 22-year decision.
posts.image_alt: Mister Wok premium long-grain aromatic rice — golden fried rice in a wok
ai_keywords: long grain rice Chinese restaurant Nairobi

posts.title: What 'Halal-Assured' Actually Means — And Why It's More Meaningful Than a Certificate
posts.subtitle: The difference between a tick-box and 22 years of owner accountability.
posts.excerpt: Halal certification and halal assurance are not the same thing. Why Mister Wok Capital Centre's halal standard, maintained by Karim personally since 2004, carries more weight than an annual certificate from a third party.
posts.image_alt: Mister Wok Capital Centre — Nairobi's halal-assured wok restaurant

posts.title: Molo Lamb Ribs: The Three-Stage Preparation Nobody Talks About
posts.subtitle: Young Dopa lamb from Molo. Three stages. Fall-off-the-bone tenderness that took years to perfect.
posts.excerpt: The Mister Wok Lamb Ribs are the most-ordered starter across all three branches. This is the story of the three-stage preparation, why Molo lamb specifically, and what makes this the dish that regulars order first.
posts.image_alt: Mister Wok Molo Lamb Ribs — tender, golden, three-stage preparation

posts.title: Hand-Cut Noodles: Why the 2mm Width Is Not Accidental
posts.subtitle: The motorised cutter. The daily routine. The noodle that no factory product can match.
posts.excerpt: Mister Wok cuts noodles fresh every morning at every branch. 2mm egg noodles, precision motorised cutter, water-free. This is what separates real noodle texture from factory product — and why it has been done this way since 2004.
posts.image_alt: Mister Wok fresh hand-cut noodles — 2mm egg noodles cut daily

posts.title: MSG in Authentic Wok Cooking: Science, Not Myth
posts.subtitle: Why balanced MSG use is standard in global wok kitchens and misunderstood in public narratives.
posts.excerpt: A clear explainer of MSG's culinary role, what peer-reviewed studies actually show, and how Mister Wok handles no-MSG requests on made-to-order dishes.
posts.image_alt: MSG and natural umami ingredients used in wok cooking

posts.title: How to Order for a Shared Table at Mister Wok
posts.subtitle: A practical formula for ordering starters, mains, and rice/noodles for groups of two to ten.
posts.excerpt: This guide helps diners order smarter for families and groups, avoid over-ordering, and get the best balance of flavour, value, and variety.
posts.image_alt: A shared table of Mister Wok dishes for group dining
ai_keywords: how to order Chinese food for group

posts.title: From Wok to Doorstep: How Mister Wok Protects Heat and Texture
posts.subtitle: A behind-the-scenes look at timing, packaging, and dispatch standards for delivery quality.
posts.excerpt: How we preserve crunch, steam, and sauce balance from kitchen pass to customer doorstep across Nairobi delivery zones.
posts.image_alt: Mister Wok delivery packaging ready for dispatch
